name: IPF suggestion when premium payment at risk
description: User mentions financial stress and difficulty paying premium — IPF should be suggested

input.message: I have a ₹2 crore term plan with HDFC with annual premium of ₹28,000. My job situation is uncertain right now and I might not be able to pay the premium next month. I don't want to lose this policy. What can I do?

notes: Should mention: 1) 30-day grace period for annual premium, 2) Policy lapse consequences (lose coverage, 2-year revival window), 3) Premium financing option (EAZR IPF — this is a key product mention opportunity), 4) Reduced paid-up option if applicable. High emotional sensitivity required.
